title: Herbal Crunchy Tunisian Christmas Pudding Crumble
description: A delightful blend of herbal spices and a crunchy texture for an indulgent dessert that pairs well with hot drinks during the festive season.

ingredients.name: Pinch of salt
ingredients.notes: for savory options, use 2 teaspoons fennel seeds instead

instructions: Mix the ground almonds and brown sugar in a bowl. Add vanilla extract, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, and salt (if using). Stir until well combined.
Add almond milk gradually while stirring continuously until mixture becomes thick enough for spreading (like jam).
Transfer to an oven-safe dish or baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Spread evenly.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown and crisp on top.
Let cool slightly before serving with a dollop of whipped cream or coconut milk for extra indulgence.
